name: Truck Slam
author: Poki
description: Truck Slam is an action game for one or two players! Jump into the madness and smash your way to victory. Take on waves of enemy trucks in solo mode or challenge a friend in a wild 1v1 battle. Wield your mighty hammer, send rivals flying, and wreck everything in your path across chaotic, ever-changing arenas. Can you be the last truck standing? Get in, slam hard, and claim the crown! How to play Truck Slam? One Player Jump: W or the up arrow key Move: A/D or left and right arrow keys Hit: S or the down arrow key Two Player Player 1: A/D to move, W to jump, S to hit Player 2: the left and right arrow keys to move, the up arrow key to jump, the down arrow key to hit Who created Truck Slam? Truck Slam is created by Happylander Ltd. Play their other games on Poki: Bowling Champion , Bottle Flip Challenge , Speed Pool King , Ping Pong Go! , Hit the Fan , and Penalty Rivals ! How can I play Truck Slam for free? You can play Truck Slam for free on Poki. Can I play Truck Slam on mobile devices and desktop? Truck Slam can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Truck Slam with my friend? Yes! Truck Slam is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same device!
